name: ralph-loop-codex
description: Codex RALF source bundle with installable hooks, launcher, and setup guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Installable Codex RALF runtime and setup helper
interface.longDescription: Use this plugin to install the Codex RALF runtime into live Codex paths, run ralf-codex on a plan file, and keep extra RALF skills optional.
defaultPrompt: Use `ralf` to explain how to install the Codex RALF runtime.
Show me how to run an existing RALF plan with `ralf-codex`.
Tell me which RALF skills are optional versus required.
